Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Issuance Of Contempt Order And Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Jan-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. Defendant Odwalla Inc.'s motion for terminating sanctions is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCE:
Helen Lee Greenberg, Esq., for defendant and moving party.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. HEARING HELD. Defendant Odwalla Inc's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. Responses without objections shall be served within 7 days of notice of this order. Sanctions in the amount of $530 shall be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
